The curated digital exhibition will be available exclusively on Samsung Art Store and features 20 contemporary artists showcased at Art Basel Hong Kong, being held March 27-29 at the Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre. title: [World Water Day] Samsung’s Promise of Water for All
summary: Ahead of World Water Day on March 22, Samsung Electronics marked the 34th anniversary with initiatives to protect water resources. Designated by the United Nations in 1992, World Water Day raises awar

sources.title: [World Water Day] Samsung’s Promise of Water for All
sources.excerpt: Ahead of World Water Day on March 22, Samsung Electronics marked the 34th anniversary with initiatives to protect water resources. Designated by the United Nations in 1992, World Water Day raises awareness of global water scarcity and pollution. This year, Samsung’s offices and business sites worldwide led environmental efforts within and beyond the company — from supporting biodiversity and advancing water stewardship to providing emergency drinking water for vulnerable communities. sources.title: Samsung Addresses SME Cyber Risks With Galaxy S26 Ultra Enterprise Edition

The findings estimate that a single cyberattack could cost SMEs up to £100,000 in lost revenue and fines, underscoring the urgency of stronger security measures. summary: Millions worldwide suffer from sleep apnea, but 80% of sufferers1 don’t even know they have it. This serious condition causes people to experience pauses in breathing while asleep — potentially disrup

sources.title: [World Sleep Day] How Samsung Is Tackling Sleep Apnea to Energize Your Days
sources.excerpt: Millions worldwide suffer from sleep apnea, but 80% of sufferers1 don’t even know they have it. This serious condition causes people to experience pauses in breathing while asleep — potentially disrupting oxygen supply, lowering sleep quality and leading to health complications including hypertension and stroke. Despite these risks, the disorder largely goes unnoticed because getting a diagnosis usually requires time-consuming and costly in-lab sleep studies. To mark World Sleep Day 2026, a glob

title: Intel's long-rumored Core Ultra 3 205 CPU finally appears for sale at French retailer — priced at $182, early listing confirms previously-known specs for the chip
summary: The Core Ultra 3 205 is an 8-core chip with 4 performance cores and 4 efficiency cores, part of the Arrow Lake family, branded as the Core Ultra 200S series. It never off

sources.title: Intel's long-rumored Core Ultra 3 205 CPU finally appears for sale at French retailer — priced at $182, early listing confirms previously-known specs for the chip
sources.excerpt: The Core Ultra 3 205 is an 8-core chip with 4 performance cores and 4 efficiency cores, part of the Arrow Lake family, branded as the Core Ultra 200S series. It never officially launched despite being listed at several OEMs as a "tray" chip and even being mentioned in Intel's own documents. Its newest spotting is on a French retailer's website where it's only available on order.
